description_long: This object is a blocky, stylized pumpkin with a cubic form and a pixelated appearance, reminiscent of voxel art. The pumpkin is predominantly orange with a small, bright green stem centered on the top surface. The front face features a carved, pixelated jack-o'-lantern face with triangular eyes and a wide, jagged mouth, giving it a playful and slightly mischievous expression. The other sides are plain, with no additional carvings or markings, emphasizing the geometric, digital aesthetic. The surface appears matte and slightly rough, suggesting a non-glossy finish. The overall design is simple yet charming, suitable for festive urban decorations or themed environments.
description: A cubic, voxel-style orange pumpkin with a green stem and a pixelated jack-o'-lantern face on the front. The sides are plain, and the surface is matte and slightly rough.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pixelated jack-o'-lantern face with eyes and a jagged mouth, and the green stem on top.
description_view_1: Back view displays a plain orange surface with the green stem visible on top, no facial features.
description_view_2: Left side view is similar to the back, showing a plain orange face and the green stem on top.
description_view_3: Right side view is also plain orange with the green stem on top, no facial features.
attribute_carving_pattern: The pumpkin features a traditional, pixelated jack-o'-lantern face with two square eyes and a wide, jagged mouth, all rendered in a geometric, blocky style. The carving is simple and stylized, with no additional motifs or etchings.
